name: Braised Chicken with Tomato Sauce and Spices

ingredients.item: chicken thighs, or 1 (4- to 4.5-pound) whole chicken, cut into 8 pieces

method: In a heated 7- to 9-quart Dutch oven over medium-high heat, cook the chicken in 1 tablespoon of olive oil for 5 to 7 minutes, until brown. Cook it in batches, if needed, so as not to crowd the pan. Drain any excess fat that accumulates. Transfer the chicken to a plate.
Return the pot to the heat and heat the remaining 1 tablespoon of olive oil.
Add the onion and stir. Cook for 5 minutes, scraping up any browned bits (fond) from the bottom of the pot.
Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute more.
Add the carrots, celery, and cinnamon. Cook for 5 minutes.
Stir in the wine, vinegar, honey, and tomato paste. Simmer for 5 to 7 minutes, until reduced by half.
Return the chicken to the pot. Cover it with the chicken broth, add the bay leaf, cover the pot, and place it in the oven. Braise for 2 hours.
